requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — RSB / RURA Installation Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——RSB / RURA安装要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——RSB / RURA安裝要求

summary.en: Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) is the national standards body and adopts international IEC standards as the basis for Rwandan standards. RSB administers the Pre-export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme for regulated product imports: electrical equipment imported into Rwanda is assessed against the applicable IEC standard by an RSB-appointed inspection body (such as Bureau Veritas, Intertek, or SGS) at the point of export. IEC 61851-1 is the applicable international safety baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements — covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 applies to DC charging stations. Rwanda's tropical highland environment (Kigali mean temperature ~22 °C, high relative humidity year-round, altitude ~1,500 m, seasonal heavy rainfall) requires attention to IP protection against humidity and condensation ingress rather than desert-sand ingress, and to corrosion resistance for exposed components.
summary.zh: 卢旺达标准局（RSB）是国家标准机构，以国际IEC标准为基础制定卢旺达标准。RSB对受管制进口产品实施出口前合格验证（PVoC）计划：进口至卢旺达的电气设备由RSB指定的检验机构（如必维国际检验集团、英特科、SGS）在出口地按照适用IEC标准进行评估。IEC 61851-1是传导充电电动汽车供电设备通用要求的适用国际安全基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023适用于直流充电站。卢旺达热带高地环境（基加利年平均气温约22°C，全年湿度较高，海拔约1500米，季节性强降雨）要求关注潮湿和冷凝水侵入的防护等级而非沙尘防护，以及外露部件的耐腐蚀性。
summary.zht: 盧旺達標準局（RSB）是國家標準機構，以國際IEC標準為基礎制定盧旺達標準。RSB對受管制進口產品實施出口前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃：進口至盧旺達的電氣設備由RSB指定的檢驗機構（如必維國際檢驗集團、英特科、SGS）在出口地按照適用IEC標準進行評估。IEC 61851-1是傳導充電電動汽車供電設備通用要求的適用國際安全基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023適用於直流充電站。盧旺達熱帶高地環境（基加利年平均氣溫約22°C，全年濕度較高，海拔約1500米，季節性強降雨）要求關注潮濕和冷凝水侵入的防護等級而非沙塵防護，以及外露部件的耐腐蝕性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
RSB PVoC programme — Pre-export Verification of Conformity for regulated imports to Rwanda
RURA electricity regulations — safety requirements for electrical installations

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports required by RSB PVoC inspection or project-owner specifications in Rwanda. China CCC certification of EV chargers is not directly transferable as Rwanda RSB PVoC evidence without a clause-level gap assessment against the applicable IEC edition.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代RSB PVoC检验或卢旺达项目业主规范所要求的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。中国CCC认证在未完成针对适用IEC版本的逐条差距评估的情况下，不能直接转换为卢旺达RSB PVoC证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代RSB PVoC檢驗或盧旺達項目業主規範所要求的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。中國CCC認證在未完成針對適用IEC版本的逐條差距評估的情況下，不能直接轉換為盧旺達RSB PVoC證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)
China CCC mandatory certification (where in scope)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix; accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products; IP-rated enclosure test certificates addressing tropical-humidity and seasonal rainfall conditions (IEC 60529 IP44 minimum indoor, IP55 or higher recommended outdoor — confirm with RSB PVoC inspection body and project owner); corrosion-resistance evidence for exposed metallic components; protective device ratings; and installation instructions aligned with REG / EUCL and RURA requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment. RSB PVoC inspection should be arranged before export through an RSB-appointed body.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵；ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据；满足热带湿度和季节性降雨条件的IP防护等级认证书（室内建议IEC 60529 IP44以上，室外建议IP55或更高——须与RSB PVoC检验机构和项目业主确认）；外露金属部件的耐腐蚀性证据；保护器件额定值；以及符合REG / EUCL和RURA要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。RSB PVoC检验应在出口前通过RSB指定机构安排。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣；ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據；滿足熱帶濕度和季節性降雨條件的IP防護等級認證書（室內建議IEC 60529 IP44以上，室外建議IP55或更高——須與RSB PVoC檢驗機構和項目業主確認）；外露金屬部件的耐腐蝕性證據；保護器件額定值；以及符合REG / EUCL和RURA要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。RSB PVoC檢驗應在出口前通過RSB指定機構安排。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RSB PVoC applies to regulated electrical product imports to Rwanda; IEC 61851 is the applicable safety framework; IP protection and installation compliance with RURA electricity regulations are required; confirm exact PVoC product category and inspection-body requirements with RSB or an appointed body (Bureau Veritas, Intertek, SGS) before export
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Rwanda without additional accredited testing; China CCC is not a Rwanda PVoC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Rwanda-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates suited to tropical-humidity conditions, and RSB PVoC inspection arranged before export. Confirm the PVoC product scope and applicable IEC edition with RSB or an appointed inspection body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向卢旺达的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、适合热带湿度条件的IP防护等级认证书，以及在出口前安排RSB PVoC检验。应向RSB或指定检验机构确认PVoC产品适用范围及适用IEC版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向盧旺達的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、適合熱帶濕度條件的IP防護等級認證書，以及在出口前安排RSB PVoC檢驗。應向RSB或指定檢驗機構確認PVoC產品適用範圍及適用IEC版本。
